summary: The actual screenshot partially matches the wireframe in layout and style, but shows differences in content, highlighting, and specific elements like resource increments and panel texts. The wireframe is partially suitable for validation but lacks detailed content representations.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both actual and wireframe feature a dark background with starfield elements and map systems visible.

correctElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-AI-ACTION-INDICATOR: Gameplay map with AI action indicator overlay
correctElements.evidence: Top bar present in both with turn, phase, and active player information.

correctElements.requirement: Screen description: Map systems remain visible
correctElements.evidence: Systems like Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus are shown connected by lines in both.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Terminal-style labels
correctElements.evidence: Resources (POP, MET, FUEL) are displayed similarly in position and style.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Thin green panel borders
correctElements.evidence: Panels in both have thin green borders.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-AI-ACTION-INDICATOR: Visually satisfy documented screen description
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: The phase displayed differs, which may indicate a mismatch in game state representation or wireframe specificity.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Simple rectangles for controls
incorrectElements.expected: Plain resource values without increments (e.g., POP 100)
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual includes dynamic increments not represented in wireframe, affecting visual comparison for UI behavior.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: AI action indicator overlay and activity log
incorrectElements.expected: Empty or placeholder for AI order
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe lacks content in left panel, while actual has specific text, making it hard to validate overlay details.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Semi-transparent black panels
incorrectElements.expected: Separate 'Selected' and 'Map Key' panels, with 'Map Key' empty
incorrectElements.actual: Single 'Map Key' panel with legend items
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual combines or alters right-side panels, missing 'Selected' and adding content to 'Map Key'.

incorrectElements.requirement: TR-UI-AUDIT-HWND-001: Actual screenshot from client HWND
incorrectElements.actual: Debug text in top right (e.g., Planets F1 Dbg:On ...)
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Presence of debug information in actual screenshot indicates potential development artifacts not accounted for in wireframe.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.actual: Page number or other text at bottom
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Bottom text differs, possibly a residual from rendering or pagination not relevant to UI.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Indicator highlights an active AI action
incorrectElements.expected: Specific highlighting (e.g., square around Arcturus in wireframe)
incorrectElements.actual: Different highlighting patterns and additional icons
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Highlighting and icons vary, which is a material mismatch for validating AI action indication; this represents a residual risk in dynamic element rendering.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe provides a good layout baseline and adheres to global style requirements, but lacks detailed content in panels and dynamic elements like highlights and increments, making it insufficient for fully validating user-facing behavior and AI action overlays.
missingRequirements: Detailed representation of AI action indicator content and activity log
Dynamic elements such as resource increments and specific highlighting for AI actions
recommendedWireframeChanges: Add placeholder text and content to panels like 'Recent AI Order' and 'Map Key' to better match expected UI
Include examples of dynamic highlights and increments to validate behavioral aspects
Remove or standardize bottom prompt text to avoid confusion with actual UI elements
